title: foottrail
description: Particle Trail Mod transforms your Minecraft experience with mesmerizing enchanting table particle effects that can be fully customized. Adjust particle amounts and heights directly from the title screen, and look forward to future updates that will expand
body:
Particle Trail Mod

Enhance your Minecraft experience with the Particle Trail Mod, which adds customizable enchanting table particle effects to your character. Tailor the appearance to your liking with the following features:

Particle Settings Screen: Access a dedicated settings screen from the title menu to adjust particle effects.
Adjustable Particle Amount: Control the number of particles to achieve the desired visual effect.
Particle Height Customization: Set the height at which particles appear around your character.
Upcoming Features:

Expanded Particle Selection: Choose from various particle types to personalize your experience.
Enhanced Settings Accessibility: Access settings directly from the in-game pause menu for convenience.
Toggle Functionality: Easily enable or disable particle effects without adjusting settings.
Note: Currently, to disable the effect, set the particle amount to 0.

Download the Particle Trail Mod today to add a touch of magic to your Minecraft adventures!
